findings.description: The `Advice` type used in `execute(String sheetName, Advice advice)` is mentioned in the source but absent from s7 hints, reducing retrievability when users ask about using the Advice-parameterized execute overload.
findings.source_evidence: void execute(String sheetName, Advice advice) — listed as one of the two execute overloads in the スーパクラスのメソッド呼び出し section
